dataset: NCEP/NCAR Reanalysis Monthly Long-Term Mean Sea Level Pressure

pi_items.source: Explicitly stated in the prompt text generated by setup_task.sh.
Confirmed by install_panoply.sh downloading the file and setup_task.sh expecting it at this path.
Directly verified via Python netCDF4 inspection of the downloaded NCEP NetCDF file, which contains the 'slp' variable.
Explicitly defined and created as OUTPUT_DIR in setup_task.sh.
Confirmed by export_result.sh which explicitly checks for these output files.
Verified by reading the downloaded NCEP NetCDF file via Python; the extracted SLP value for January at 65.0N, 337.5E (22.5W) is 997.73 mb, which falls in this range.
Verified by reading the downloaded NCEP NetCDF file via Python; the extracted SLP value for January at 37.5N, 332.5E (27.5W) is 1022.77 mb, which falls in this range.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real NCEP Reanalysis Sea Level Pressure data downloaded from NOAA. The required exact January pressure values for the Icelandic Low (65.0N, 22.5W) and Azores High (37.5N, 27.5W) were independently verified via Python netCDF4 as ~997.7 mb and ~1022.8 mb respectively, which correctly fall within the target iceland_range ([990.0, 1005.0]) and azores_range ([1015.0, 1030.0]). Output expectations and paths correspond to those defined in the setup and export scripts.
